testcase.name: test_boot_banner_and_ticks

error.message: failed on setup with "esptool.util.FatalError: Failed to connect to ESP32-C3: Download mode successfully detected, but getting no sync reply: The serial TX path seems to be down. For troubleshooting steps visit: https://docs.espressif.com/projects/esptool/en/latest/troubleshooting.html"
